bullets.text: Trump stated that Iran shot down a US helicopter and vowed a response, with two crew members rescued by an American sea drone.
Israeli air strikes hit the Lebanese city of Tyre, despite an Iranian warning that hostilities could resume if attacks on Hezbollah do not cease.
A man was reportedly shot dead during a protest in Kenya against a proposed US Ebola quarantine center, amid public concerns about cross-border infection risks and government transparency.
A retail worker in Sydney reported being threatened by a man who claimed to have a knife, leading to concerns about safety in public spaces.
Police in Melbourne are investigating after a man was found dead in a park with apparent burn injuries.
Australia is on the brink of experiencing its first El Niño weather event since spring 2023, which historically brings hotter and drier conditions.
The Nasdaq experienced a downturn as AI-linked stocks pulled back, overshadowing gains in other market sectors.
Bond traders are increasingly betting on multiple Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes in the coming months, with some anticipating a move as early as September.
Brussels has mandated Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI agents, indicating EU efforts to regulate the rapidly developing market for autonomous AI agents.
